sglang.title: Temporary fix OpenAI API for Pydantic v1/v2
sglang.author: comaniac
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Relate to #126
This PR makes OpenAI API compatible with both Pydantic v1 and v2. Since this is a temporary fix, we should remove the changes in this PR after dropping the Pydantic v1.
cc @fozziethebeat

sglang.title: Add gptq quantization model support
sglang.author: Arcmoon-Hu
sglang.bodyExcerpt: I just test on Qwen-1.8B-Chat-Int4  model on my old gpu.

sglang.title: Support decode token logprobs
sglang.author: comaniac
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Initial support to logprobs of decoding tokens:

When return_logprobs is set, the response includes an additional field token_logprobs, which has a list of logprob for each token including prompt tokens. Each element in this list contains (token text, token ID, logprob).
When streaming, the token_lo

sglang.title: [Submodule] Change FlashInfer to import
sglang.author: comaniac
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR removes submodule flashinfer from this repo. As flashinfer is now officially released, we can directly install it via pip. However, I didn't add it to pyproject.toml but just updated the README due to two reasons:

flashinfer is not available on PYPI yet.
It supports limited CUDA version and

vllm.title: fix issue when model parameter is not a model id but path of the model.
vllm.author: liuyhwangyh
vllm.bodyExcerpt: fix issue when model parameter is not a model id but path of the model， will raise requests.exceptions.HTTPError: 404 Client Error

vllm.title: [Minor] More fix of test_cache.py CI test failure

vllm.title: [ROCm] Fix build problem resulted from previous commit related to FP8 kv-cache support
vllm.author: hongxiayang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes: #2725
Current head failed to build on ROCm, and I got errors like:
g++ -pthread -B /opt/conda/envs/py_3.8/compiler_compat -Wl,--sysroot=/ -pthread -shared -B /opt/conda/envs/py_3.8/compiler_compat -L/opt/conda/envs/py_3.8/lib -Wl,-rpath=/opt/conda/envs/py_3.8/lib -WlEN,--no-as-needed -Wl,--sy
